question: Is the city where the owner of Catalyst Technologies is headquartered also the home of the Carolina Panthers NFL team?

chain.fact: Honeywell International Inc. owns Catalyst Technologies.
Honeywell is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
Charlotte is the home of the Carolina Panthers.
The Carolina Panthers are a professional American football team based in Charlotte.

article_title: Honeywell to Buy Johnson Matthey Catalyst Unit for £1.33 Billion - Bloomberg
event_title: Which companies will be acquired before 2027?
